title: The Brazilian Localization Project [PT-BR]
description: Localizes any and all mods to PTBR.
body:
The Brazilian Project aims to provide complete Brazilian Portuguese (PT-BR) translation coverage for modded Minecraft, with a special focus on mods that do not currently include a native translation.

In addition to translating untranslated mods, the project also works on improving existing PT-BR translations by completing missing entries, correcting inconsistencies, refining terminology, and making the text feel more natural for Brazilian players.

If you would like to request support for a specific mod, please provide the mod’s name and the Minecraft version you would like it to be supported on. This helps ensure that the translation can be prepared for the correct version and mod release.

Join my discord server for updates and feedback at https://discord.com/invite/XBYfv2ttUw
